Publicly traded companies కోసం financial controls. Quarterly access reviews, financial systems కు SoD, privileged access monitoring.
ISO 27001
ISO 27001
International information security standard. Requires IAM policies, access control procedures, regular audits, and evidence of control effectiveness for certification.
International information security standard. IAM policies, access control procedures, regular audits, certification కోసం control effectiveness evidence.
Real-World Example నిజ జీవిత ఉదాహరణ  SOC 2 + HIPAA Compliance at a Health Tech Company  Health Tech Company లో SOC 2 + HIPAA Compliance
HealthTech SaaS must pass SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA: Access Reviews: Every quarter, all 200 managers get an email listing each direct report's app access. They click Approve/Revoke. Any unreviewed access is auto-revoked after 14 days. Separation of Duties: Developers cannot access production databases — only the DBA team can. Offboarding: When an employee leaves, their access is revoked within 4 hours (HIPAA requires same-day). Audit Logs: Every PHI access is logged in System Log — retained for 7 years. Auditor accesses a pre-built Okta report — SOC 2 passed in 45 minutes of evidence review.
HealthTech SaaS SOC 2 Type II మరియు HIPAA pass చేయాలి: Access Reviews: Every quarter 200 managers ప్రతి direct report's access review చేస్తారు. Unreviewed access 14 రోజుల తర్వాత auto-revoke. SoD: Developers production databases access చేయలేరు. Offboarding: ఉద్యోగి వెళ్ళిపోతే 4 గంటల్లో access revoke. Audit Logs: ప్రతి PHI access 7 సంవత్సరాలు log. Auditor Okta pre-built report access చేస్తారు — 45 నిమిషాల evidence review లో SOC 2 passed.
← Back to Okta Guide
📖
IAM Concepts › IAM Technical Terms
IAM Technical Terms
IAM సాంకేతిక పదాలు
Essential IAM Glossary — A to Z
Definition & Overview
A reference glossary of the most important technical terms used in Identity and Access Management. These terms appear in Okta documentation, audit reports, compliance frameworks, and everyday IAM conversations.
Identity and Access Management లో ఉపయోగించే most important technical terms యొక్క reference glossary. ఈ terms Okta documentation, audit reports, compliance frameworks లో కనిపిస్తాయి.
JWTFederationJITPAMCIAM
Key Concepts
Term / పదంExplanation / వివరణ
ACL (Access Control List)
ACL
A list defining which users or groups can access a resource and what actions they can perform. More granular than role-based access.
Resource access చేయగల users లేదా groups మరియు వారు perform చేయగల actions define చేసే list.
CAPTCHA
CAPTCHA
Challenge used to distinguish humans from bots on login pages. Okta supports hCAPTCHA and reCAPTCHA to block credential stuffing attacks.
Login pages లో humans మరియు bots ని వేరు చేయడానికి ఉపయోగించే challenge. Okta hCAPTCHA మరియు reCAPTCHA support చేస్తుంది.
Claim
Claim
A key-value pair in a token asserting something about the user: sub (subject/user ID), email, role, department. Used in JWTs, SAML assertions.
Token లో user గురించి asserting చేసే key-value pair: sub, email, role, department. JWTs, SAML assertions లో ఉపయోగించబడుతుంది.
Directory
Directory
A database that stores and organizes identity information. Examples: Microsoft Active Directory, LDAP, Okta Universal Directory.
Identity information store మరియు organize చేసే database. Examples: Microsoft Active Directory, LDAP, Okta Universal Directory.
Entity ID
Entity ID
Unique identifier for an IdP or SP in SAML metadata. Format is usually a URL: https://company.okta.com/app/salesforce/sso/saml/metadata.
SAML metadata లో IdP లేదా SP కోసం unique identifier. Format సాధారణంగా URL: https://company.okta.com/...
Federation
Federation
Trust relationship between two separate identity systems allowing users from one to access resources in another without creating duplicate accounts.
రెండు separate identity systems మధ్య trust relationship — ఒకటిలో users మరొకదాని resources access చేయగలరు, duplicate accounts లేకుండా.
JIT Provisioning
JIT Provisioning
Just-In-Time provisioning. User account created automatically at first login to an app, using attributes from the SAML/OIDC assertion.
Just-In-Time provisioning. SAML/OIDC assertion నుండి attributes వాడి app లో first login వద్ద user account automatically create అవుతుంది.
PAM (Privileged Access Management)
PAM
System for securing, controlling, and auditing privileged accounts (admins, root, service accounts). Features: vault passwords, session recording, just-in-time elevation.
Privileged accounts (admins, root) secure, control, audit చేసే system. Features: password vault, session recording, just-in-time elevation.
PEP / PDP (Policy Enforcement/Decision Point)
PEP / PDP
PEP: Enforces access policy at the resource level. PDP: Makes the access decision based on policies. Together they implement attribute-based access control.
PEP: Resource level లో access policy enforce చేస్తుంది. PDP: Policies ఆధారంగా access decision చేస్తుంది.
Tenant
Tenant
An isolated instance of an IAM system for one organization. Each Okta org is a tenant with its own users, policies, apps, and settings — fully isolated from other orgs.
ఒక organization కోసం IAM system యొక్క isolated instance. ప్రతి Okta org ఒక tenant — users, policies, apps అన్నీ isolated.
Token Rotation
Token Rotation
Issuing a new access token when the current one expires — using the refresh token. Rotating refresh tokens (each use issues a new one) improves security.
Current token expire అయినప్పుడు refresh token వాడి new access token జారీ చేయడం. Rotating refresh tokens security మెరుగుపరుస్తాయి.
Workforce Identity vs Customer Identity
Workforce vs Customer Identity
Workforce (WIC): IAM for employees, contractors, partners. Customer (CIAM): IAM for end consumers — different UX, scale (millions of users), self-service registration.
Workforce (WIC): employees, contractors కోసం IAM. Customer (CIAM): end consumers కోసం — different UX, millions of users, self-service registration.
Real-World Example నిజ జీవిత ఉదాహరణ  IAM Glossary in Action at a SaaS Company  SaaS Company లో IAM Glossary in Action
CloudSaaS uses IAM terms daily: Their security engineer discusses federation with a partner. The developer queries why the JWT claim 'role' is missing. The IT admin sets up JIT provisioning for a new SAML app so new partner accounts self-create at first login. The CISO implements a PAM vault so no admin ever sees a production database password — they check out a session that auto-expires in 4 hours. The compliance team uses PEP/PDP concepts when designing ABAC policies for their multi-tenant SaaS product. Every term connects to a real system or decision.
CloudSaaS daily IAM terms వాడుతుంది: Security engineer partner తో federation గురించి discuss చేస్తారు. Developer JWT claim 'role' missing అని query చేస్తారు. IT admin కొత్త SAML app కు JIT provisioning setup చేస్తారు. CISO production database passwords ఎవరూ చూడకుండా PAM vault implement చేస్తారు — 4-hour auto-expire sessions. Compliance team multi-tenant SaaS product కు PEP/PDP concepts తో ABAC policies design చేస్తారు.
← Back to Okta Guide
🧩
IAM Concepts › IAM Components
IAM Components
IAM భాగాలు
Building Blocks of an IAM Architecture
Definition & Overview
A complete enterprise IAM architecture is composed of multiple specialized components working together. Understanding each component's role helps in designing secure, scalable identity systems and understanding how Okta fits into the broader IAM ecosystem.
Complete enterprise IAM architecture అనేక specialized components కలిసి పని చేయడం ద్వారా తయారవుతుంది. ప్రతి component యొక్క role అర్థం చేసుకోవడం secure, scalable identity systems design చేయడంలో help చేస్తుంది.
IdPPAMIGASIEMMDM
Key Concepts
Term / పదంExplanation / వివరణ
Identity Provider (IdP)
Identity Provider (IdP)
The authoritative system that authenticates users and issues identity tokens/assertions. Examples: Okta, Azure AD, Ping Identity. The 'source of truth' for identity.
Users authenticate చేసి identity tokens/assertions జారీ చేసే authoritative system. Examples: Okta, Azure AD. Identity కోసం 'source of truth'.
Service Provider (SP)
Service Provider (SP)
The application or service that relies on the IdP for authentication. Trusts the IdP's assertions. Examples: Salesforce, Workday, custom web app.
Authentication కోసం IdP పై rely చేసే application లేదా service. IdP's assertions trust చేస్తుంది. Examples: Salesforce, Workday.
Universal Directory (UD)
Universal Directory (UD)
Okta's cloud-based LDAP replacement. Stores all user profiles, custom attributes, and group memberships. The single source of truth for identity in Okta.
Okta's cloud-based LDAP replacement. User profiles, custom attributes, group memberships store చేస్తుంది. Okta లో identity కోసం single source of truth.
Policy Engine
Policy Engine
Evaluates access requests against configured policies (authentication policies, network zones, risk signals, device trust) to Allow or Deny access.
Configured policies (authentication policies, network zones, risk signals, device trust) తో access requests evaluate చేసి Allow లేదా Deny చేస్తుంది.
Token Vault / Secret Store
Token Vault
Secure storage for secrets, API keys, certificates, and credentials. In Okta: Key Management stores JWT signing keys. PAM systems store privileged credentials.
Secrets, API keys, certificates, credentials కోసం secure storage. Okta లో: Key Management JWT signing keys store చేస్తుంది.
SIEM Integration
SIEM Integration
Security Information and Event Management. IAM logs (login events, policy violations, suspicious activity) stream to SIEM (Splunk, Sentinel, Elastic) for correlation and alerting.
IAM logs (login events, policy violations) SIEM (Splunk, Sentinel, Elastic) కు stream చేయబడతాయి correlation మరియు alerting కోసం.
MDM / EMM
MDM / EMM
Mobile Device Management / Enterprise Mobility Management. Manages enrolled devices (Jamf for macOS, Intune for Windows). Integrates with Okta for device trust signals.
Enrolled devices manage చేస్తుంది (Jamf for macOS, Intune for Windows). Device trust signals కోసం Okta తో integrate అవుతుంది.
PAM System
PAM System
Privileged Access Management platform (CyberArk, BeyondTrust). Vaults privileged credentials, provides just-in-time access, records privileged sessions. Integrates with Okta for authentication.
Privileged credentials vault చేస్తుంది, just-in-time access provide చేస్తుంది, privileged sessions record చేస్తుంది. Authentication కోసం Okta తో integrate అవుతుంది.
IGA (Identity Governance & Administration)
IGA
Platform managing access certifications, SoD policies, role mining, and audit reporting. Examples: SailPoint, Saviynt. Integrates with Okta as the enforcement layer.
Access certifications, SoD policies, role mining, audit reporting manage చేసే platform. Examples: SailPoint, Saviynt. Enforcement layer గా Okta తో integrate అవుతుంది.
Real-World Example నిజ జీవిత ఉదాహరణ  Full IAM Stack at a Global Enterprise  Global Enterprise లో Full IAM Stack
MegaGlobal Corp runs a complete IAM stack with every component: Okta (IdP) — central identity authority for 50,000 employees. Okta Universal Directory — stores all user profiles, synced from SAP HR. Okta Policy Engine — 200+ auth policies controlling access by role, location, device. Jamf + Intune (MDM) — device trust signals fed to Okta. CyberArk (PAM) — privileged accounts for 100 IT admins, session-recorded, integrates with Okta for MFA. SailPoint (IGA) — quarterly access certifications, SoD checks, pushes role assignments to Okta. Splunk (SIEM) — receives all Okta events via Log Streaming, 24/7 SOC monitoring. All components working in concert = zero access incidents in 18 months.
MegaGlobal Corp complete IAM stack run చేస్తుంది: Okta (IdP) — 50,000 employees కు central identity authority. Okta Universal Directory — SAP HR నుండి sync చేయబడిన user profiles. Okta Policy Engine — 200+ auth policies. Jamf + Intune (MDM) — device trust signals Okta కు. CyberArk (PAM) — 100 IT admins privileged accounts, session-recorded. SailPoint (IGA) — quarterly certifications, SoD checks. Splunk (SIEM) — Log Streaming ద్వారా అన్ని Okta events, 24/7 SOC. అన్నీ కలిసి పని చేయడం = 18 నెలల్లో zero access incidents.
← Back to Okta Guide
🔐 SSO & Login Failures
L2 / L3 Questions
🔐
Interview Prep › SSO & Login Failures
SSO & Login Failure Questions
SSO & లాగిన్ వైఫల్య ప్రశ్నలు
L2 L3 ServiceNow · Okta · SAML
Q1
Okta SSO Failure for Business Application — User cannot log in to ServiceNow through Okta SSO
Okta SSO వైఫల్యం — ServiceNow ద్వారా లాగిన్ కాలేదు
Ticket:INC-OKTA-10421 Priority:P2 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Validate user status in Okta
    Confirm the user is Active and not Suspended. Check if the user is assigned to the ServiceNow Okta app. A deactivated user or missing app assignment is the #1 cause.
    Okta లో user Active మరియు Suspended కాదని confirm చేయండి. User ServiceNow Okta app కు assigned అయ్యారా check చేయండి. Deactivated user లేదా missing app assignment అత్యంత సాధారణ కారణం.
  • 2
    Check application assignment and group membership
    Ensure the correct Okta group is assigned to ServiceNow. Confirm no recent group removals triggered by HR sync or lifecycle workflows.
    Correct Okta group ServiceNow కు assigned అయిందా నిర్ధారించండి. HR sync లేదా lifecycle workflow ద్వారా recent group removals జరిగాయా confirm చేయండి.
  • 3
    Review SAML configuration
    Verify NameID format and attribute mappings match ServiceNow's requirements. Compare the Okta SAML assertion with what ServiceNow expects — mismatched email formats are a common hidden cause.
    NameID format మరియు attribute mappings ServiceNow requirements తో match అవుతున్నాయా verify చేయండి. Mismatched email formats సాధారణ hidden cause.
  • 4
    Check Okta System Logs
    Look for error codes: INVALID_SAML_RESPONSE, USER_NOT_ASSIGNED, or AUTHENTICATION_FAILED. Filter by user, app, and time window to pinpoint the failure.
    Okta System Logs లో error codes చూడండి: INVALID_SAML_RESPONSE, USER_NOT_ASSIGNED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED. User, app, time ద్వారా filter చేయండి.
  • 5
    Test using Okta Preview Mode
    Use 'Preview the SAML Assertion' in Okta admin to reproduce the exact token being sent. Compare field-by-field with ServiceNow's SP metadata.
    Okta admin లో 'Preview the SAML Assertion' వాడి exact token reproduce చేయండి. ServiceNow SP metadata తో field-by-field compare చేయండి.
  • 6
    Coordinate with ServiceNow team
    Confirm no recent changes to ServiceNow SSO config or SAML certificate expiry. Check ServiceNow's own SSO error log (under System Logs in ServiceNow).
    ServiceNow SSO config లేదా SAML certificate expiry లో recent changes లేవా confirm చేయండి. ServiceNow లో SSO error log check చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
When a user can't access ServiceNow through Okta, I first verify their account status and app assignment. Most issues are caused by a missing group assignment or a misconfigured SAML attribute. I use Okta's system logs and SAML preview to find the exact error, then fix it — ensuring the user is back to work without needing repeated IT help.
User Okta ద్వారా ServiceNow access చేయలేకపోతే, నేను ముందు వారి account status మరియు app assignment verify చేస్తాను. చాలా సమస్యలు missing group assignment లేదా misconfigured SAML attribute వల్ల వస్తాయి. Okta system logs మరియు SAML preview వాడి exact error find చేసి fix చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — GlobalInsurance — ServiceNow SSO Failure  — GlobalInsurance — ServiceNow SSO వైఫల్యం
GlobalInsurance has 4,000 employees using Okta SSO for ServiceNow. One Monday morning, a Claims analyst Rajesh couldn't access ServiceNow — getting an 'Invalid SAML Response' error. The IAM engineer checked Okta System Logs and found: Rajesh's manager had moved him from 'Claims-Team' to 'Claims-Senior' group in AD over the weekend. The AD→Okta sync ran, removed him from 'Claims-Team', but the 'Claims-Senior' group wasn't assigned to ServiceNow in Okta. Fix: Assign 'Claims-Senior' group to the ServiceNow app → Rajesh logs in within 2 minutes. Root cause catalogued to prevent future group-app assignment gaps.
GlobalInsurance 4,000 employees Okta SSO ద్వారా ServiceNow వాడతారు. Claims analyst Rajesh Monday morning ServiceNow access చేయలేకపోయాడు — 'Invalid SAML Response' error వస్తుంది. IAM engineer Okta System Logs check చేసి కనుగొన్నారు: Rajesh manager weekend లో అతనిని 'Claims-Team' నుండి 'Claims-Senior' group కు move చేశారు. AD→Okta sync run అయింది, 'Claims-Team' నుండి remove చేసింది, కానీ 'Claims-Senior' group Okta లో ServiceNow కు assign అవ్వలేదు. Fix: 'Claims-Senior' group ServiceNow app కు assign → 2 నిమిషాల్లో login.
💡 Senior Insight
Always check group-app assignments in Okta when a SAML error appears — not just the SAML config itself. Group membership changes from AD sync are the most overlooked trigger.
SAML error వచ్చినప్పుడు SAML config మాత్రమే కాదు, Okta లో group-app assignments check చేయండి. AD sync నుండి group membership changes అత్యంత overlooked trigger.
Q6
Okta Group Rules Not Assigning Application Access — AD group change didn't grant Salesforce access
Okta Group Rules Application Access ఇవ్వడం లేదు
Ticket:INC-OKTA-11894 Priority:P2 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Verify AD group membership
    Confirm the user is in the correct AD group in Active Directory. Check replication timing — AD changes can take 15–30 min to propagate to all domain controllers.
    User Active Directory లో correct AD group లో ఉన్నారా confirm చేయండి. AD changes అన్ని domain controllers కు propagate అవడానికి 15–30 నిమిషాలు పట్టవచ్చు.
  • 2
    Check AD → Okta sync timing
    Review last successful directory sync timestamp in Okta Admin. Confirm the AD group is scoped for import in the Okta AD agent settings.
    Okta Admin లో last successful directory sync timestamp review చేయండి. AD group Okta AD agent settings లో import కు scoped అయిందా confirm చేయండి.
  • 3
    Review Okta Group Rules logic
    Navigate to Directory > Groups > Rules. Validate rule conditions — check if they match on OU, group name regex, or custom attributes. Test the rule's expression using Okta's rule evaluator.
    Directory > Groups > Rules కు navigate చేయండి. Rule conditions validate చేయండి — OU, group name regex, లేదా custom attributes. Rule expression Okta evaluator తో test చేయండి.
  • 4
    Confirm app assignment on the group
    Verify the Okta group (created by the rule) is actually assigned to Salesforce. Rules create/manage groups but the group must also be explicitly assigned to the app.
    Rule ద్వారా created అయిన Okta group Salesforce కు actually assigned అయిందా verify చేయండి. Groups create అయినా app కు explicitly assign చేయాలి.
  • 5
    Force re-evaluation
    Deactivate and reactivate the group rule, or run a manual import of the user from AD to trigger fresh group rule evaluation.
    Group rule deactivate చేసి reactivate చేయండి, లేదా AD నుండి user ని manually import చేయండి — fresh group rule evaluation trigger అవుతుంది.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Access automation relies on group rules being correctly configured. When a rule doesn't fire as expected, I trace the flow from AD group membership to Okta rule to app assignment. It's usually a misconfigured rule expression or a missing app-group link.
Access automation group rules సరిగ్గా configure అయినప్పుడు పని చేస్తుంది. Rule expected గా fire కాకపోతే, AD group membership నుండి Okta rule నుండి app assignment వరకు flow trace చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — SalesCorp — Salesforce Access Automation Failure  — SalesCorp — Salesforce Access Automation వైఫల్యం
SalesCorp uses Okta group rules to auto-assign Salesforce based on the AD group 'Sales-EMEA'. When a new sales manager Anita joined the EMEA team, her AD group was correct, but she couldn't access Salesforce. Investigation showed: The Okta group rule used regex '^Sales-APAC' (old copy-paste error) instead of '^Sales-EMEA'. The rule never fired. Fix: Corrected the regex, re-evaluated the rule, Anita got access within 10 minutes. The team then audited all 23 group rules for similar copy-paste errors — finding 3 more broken rules affecting other apps.
SalesCorp 'Sales-EMEA' AD group ఆధారంగా Salesforce auto-assign చేయడానికి Okta group rules వాడుతుంది. New sales manager Anita EMEA team join అయినప్పుడు AD group correct గా ఉంది కానీ Salesforce access రాలేదు. Investigation లో తేలింది: Okta group rule regex '^Sales-APAC' (old copy-paste error) వాడింది, '^Sales-EMEA' కాదు. Rule ఎప్పుడూ fire కాలేదు. Fix: Regex correct చేశాం, rule re-evaluate చేశాం, 10 నిమిషాల్లో Anita access పొందింది. Team అన్ని 23 group rules audit చేసి 3 more broken rules కనుగొన్నారు.
Q13
Okta User Locked Out After Password Reset — reset works but account still locks out
Password Reset తర్వాత Account Lock అవుతోంది
Ticket:INC-OKTA-12901 Priority:P2 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Check lockout policy and failed attempt threshold
    Review the Okta password policy: how many failed attempts trigger lockout. Check if the lockout duration is permanent or time-based.
    Okta password policy review చేయండి: ఎన్ని failed attempts lockout trigger చేస్తాయి. Lockout duration permanent గా ఉందా లేదా time-based గా ఉందా check చేయండి.
  • 2
    Review System Log for automated failures
    Check if a service, mobile app, or browser is still using the old password and hammering the account with automated login attempts — causing relocking.
    Mobile app లేదా browser old password వాడి automated login attempts చేస్తున్నాయా check చేయండి — ఇది account relocking కు కారణమవుతుంది.
  • 3
    Verify password sync with Active Directory
    If Okta delegates auth to AD, the AD password must also be reset. A mismatch between Okta and AD passwords causes continuous failures.
    Okta AD కు auth delegate చేస్తే, AD password కూడా reset అవ్వాలి. Okta మరియు AD passwords మధ్య mismatch continuous failures కు కారణమవుతుంది.
  • 4
    Clear all active sessions and tokens
    Terminate all of the user's active sessions in Okta. Old refresh tokens from mobile or desktop apps may keep re-authenticating with the old password.
    Okta లో user యొక్క అన్ని active sessions terminate చేయండి. Mobile లేదా desktop apps నుండి old refresh tokens old password తో re-authenticate అవుతూ ఉండవచ్చు.
  • 5
    Unlock and test login with user
    Unlock the user account, guide them to log in fresh from a browser (not a cached app), confirm successful login, then check if any background app still triggers a lockout.
    User account unlock చేయండి, browser నుండి fresh login guide చేయండి (cached app కాదు), successful login confirm చేయండి, తర్వాత background app lockout trigger చేస్తుందా check చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
After a password reset, lockouts usually happen because an old device or background app keeps retrying with the stale password. I clear all sessions, verify AD sync, and guide the user through a clean login — solving the issue without weakening security.
Password reset తర్వాత lockouts సాధారణంగా old device లేదా background app stale password తో retry చేయడం వల్ల జరుగుతాయి. అన్ని sessions clear చేసి, AD sync verify చేసి, clean login guide చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — RetailChain — Warehouse Manager Account Loop  — RetailChain — Warehouse Manager Account Loop
RetailChain warehouse manager Kumar reset his Okta password via self-service but got locked out again within 5 minutes — three times in a row. IAM investigation found: Kumar's iPhone Okta Mobile app had his old password cached and was retrying authentication every 90 seconds in the background. Also, the Okta Outlook plugin on his laptop was doing the same. Fix: IAM engineer cleared all of Kumar's active sessions, revoked all app tokens, asked Kumar to update the password in the iPhone app and Outlook plugin. No more lockouts. The team then sent a company-wide notice: 'After a password reset, update all mobile apps and Outlook plugins.'
RetailChain warehouse manager Kumar self-service ద్వారా Okta password reset చేశాడు కానీ 5 నిమిషాల్లో మళ్ళీ lock out అయ్యాడు — వరుసగా మూడు సార్లు. IAM investigation లో తేలింది: Kumar యొక్క iPhone Okta Mobile app old password cache చేసి 90 seconds కోసారి background లో retry చేస్తోంది. అలాగే laptop లో Okta Outlook plugin కూడా. Fix: IAM engineer Kumar యొక్క అన్ని active sessions clear చేసి, app tokens revoke చేసి, iPhone app మరియు Outlook plugin లో password update చేయమని అడిగారు.

🛡️
Interview Prep › MFA & Authentication
MFA & Authentication Questions
MFA & ప్రమాణీకరణ ప్రశ్నలు
L2 L3 P1 Security
Q5
MFA Enrollment Issues in Okta — User cannot enroll in Okta Verify and keeps failing MFA setup
Okta Verify Enrollment విఫలమవుతోంది
Ticket:INC-MFA-55673 Priority:P3 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Check MFA policy assignment
    Confirm the correct MFA policy is applied to the user's group. Verify if enrollment is required or optional. Check if the factor type (Okta Verify) is enabled in the policy.
    Correct MFA policy user's group కు applied అయిందా confirm చేయండి. Enrollment required గా ఉందా లేదా optional గా ఉందా verify చేయండి. Factor type (Okta Verify) policy లో enabled అయిందా check చేయండి.
  • 2
    Review and reset enrolled factors
    Check if old, corrupted, or duplicate Okta Verify registrations exist. Remove them completely from the user's profile before re-enrolling. A stale factor often blocks new enrollment.
    Old, corrupted, లేదా duplicate Okta Verify registrations ఉన్నాయా check చేయండి. Re-enroll చేయడానికి ముందు user profile నుండి completely remove చేయండి.
  • 3
    Verify device compatibility
    Confirm the user's phone OS version supports Okta Verify (iOS 14+ or Android 8+). Check the app version — very old Okta Verify builds have enrollment bugs.
    User's phone OS version Okta Verify support చేస్తుందా confirm చేయండి (iOS 14+ లేదా Android 8+). App version check చేయండి — very old Okta Verify builds enrollment bugs కలిగి ఉంటాయి.
  • 4
    Reset MFA and re-enroll with the user
    Use Okta Admin Console to reset all factors for the user. Walk them through the enrollment step-by-step — QR code scan, push test, biometric setup.
    Okta Admin Console వాడి user కోసం అన్ని factors reset చేయండి. QR code scan, push test, biometric setup step-by-step walk through చేయండి.
  • 5
    Enable SMS as temporary backup if needed
    If push notifications fail due to network issues, temporarily enable SMS OTP as a backup factor to unblock the user while investigating the Okta Verify root cause.
    Network issues వల్ల push notifications fail అయితే, user unblock చేయడానికి temporarily SMS OTP enable చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
MFA enrollment failures are often caused by old factor registrations or device incompatibility. I reset the user's factors and guide them through a clean re-enrollment, restoring secure access without compromising security controls.
MFA enrollment failures సాధారణంగా old factor registrations లేదా device incompatibility వల్ల జరుగుతాయి. User's factors reset చేసి clean re-enrollment guide చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — FinanceBank — New Branch Manager MFA Block  — FinanceBank — New Branch Manager MFA Block
FinanceBank made Okta Verify mandatory for all managers. New branch manager Priya kept failing MFA enrollment on her iPhone. Investigation: Her previous employee profile (from a short contract 2 years ago) still had an old Okta Verify registration linked to a phone she no longer owned. The old registration blocked new enrollment on her current phone. Fix: IAM engineer removed all old factor registrations, sent Priya a fresh enrollment email, walked her through the setup — enrolled in 4 minutes. Lesson: Rehire/re-contract processes must include factor cleanup as a standard step.
FinanceBank అన్ని managers కు Okta Verify mandatory చేసింది. New branch manager Priya iPhone లో MFA enrollment fail అవుతోంది. Investigation: 2 సంవత్సరాల క్రితం short contract నుండి ఆమె previous employee profile లో old Okta Verify registration ఉంది — ఆమె ఇప్పుడు లేని phone కు linked. Old registration new enrollment block చేసింది. Fix: IAM engineer అన్ని old factors remove చేసి, fresh enrollment email పంపి, 4 నిమిషాల్లో enroll చేశారు.
Q17
Okta Verify Push Not Received — User doesn't receive Okta Verify push notifications
Okta Verify Push Notifications రావడం లేదు
Ticket:INC-MFA-60112 Priority:P3 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Check device registration and binding
    Confirm the device is properly registered in Okta Verify with a valid device token. Push notifications are tied to the specific device token — if the device was replaced or OS reset, the token is invalid.
    Device Okta Verify లో valid device token తో properly registered అయిందా confirm చేయండి. Push notifications specific device token కు tied — device replace అయినా లేదా OS reset అయినా token invalid అవుతుంది.
  • 2
    Verify OS push notification permissions
    On iPhone: Settings > Notifications > Okta Verify — confirm Allow Notifications is ON. On Android: App Info > Notifications — all notification types enabled. This is the #1 overlooked cause.
    iPhone లో: Settings > Notifications > Okta Verify — Allow Notifications ON అయిందా confirm చేయండి. Android లో: App Info > Notifications — అన్ని notification types enabled అయిందా. ఇది #1 overlooked cause.
  • 3
    Check device time synchronization
    Push notifications and TOTP both fail if the device clock is off by more than 30 seconds. Have the user enable 'Set Time Automatically' in device settings.
    Device clock 30 seconds కంటే ఎక్కువ off అయినా push notifications మరియు TOTP fail అవుతాయి. User device settings లో 'Set Time Automatically' enable చేయమని చెప్పండి.
  • 4
    Test network connectivity from the device
    Okta Verify push requires the device to reach Okta's push service. Test on both Wi-Fi and mobile data. Some corporate Wi-Fi blocks push notification ports.
    Okta Verify push Okta's push service reach చేయడానికి device network అవసరం. Wi-Fi మరియు mobile data రెండింటిలో test చేయండి. కొన్ని corporate Wi-Fi push notification ports block చేస్తాయి.
  • 5
    Re-enroll the factor if needed
    If all else fails, remove the Okta Verify factor and re-enroll it on the device. This generates a fresh device token and binding — most reliable resolution.
    అన్నీ fail అయితే, Okta Verify factor remove చేసి device లో re-enroll చేయండి. ఇది fresh device token మరియు binding generate చేస్తుంది — most reliable resolution.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Push notification failures are usually a device-side issue — notification permissions, time sync, or network. I diagnose these systematically before resorting to re-enrollment. Most users are unblocked within 10 minutes.
Push notification failures సాధారణంగా device-side issue — notification permissions, time sync, లేదా network. Re-enrollment కు resort చేయడానికి ముందు systematically diagnose చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — TechMfg — Shop Floor Engineer Remote Login  — TechMfg — Shop Floor Engineer Remote Login
TechMfg engineer Venkat working from a remote plant site couldn't receive Okta Verify pushes to approve his login to the production ERP system. The IAM team's investigation: 1) Device time was correct. 2) Notifications were ON. 3) The plant's Wi-Fi network blocked port 443 to *.okta.com push endpoints — a firewall misconfiguration. Temporary fix: Venkat switched to mobile data on his phone → push notifications worked immediately. Permanent fix: Network team opened port 443 to Okta's push IPs on the plant firewall. Root cause documented for all 6 plant sites.
TechMfg engineer Venkat remote plant site నుండి production ERP login approve చేయడానికి Okta Verify pushes receive చేయలేకపోయాడు. IAM team investigation: 1) Device time correct. 2) Notifications ON. 3) Plant's Wi-Fi network port 443 to *.okta.com push endpoints block చేసింది — firewall misconfiguration. Temporary fix: Venkat mobile data కు switch → push notifications worked immediately. Permanent fix: Network team Okta's push IPs కు port 443 open చేశారు.
💡 Senior Insight
Device-side MFA failures often mask network-side problems. Always test on both corporate Wi-Fi and mobile data to quickly isolate the cause.
Device-side MFA failures తరచుగా network-side problems mask చేస్తాయి. Cause isolate చేయడానికి corporate Wi-Fi మరియు mobile data రెండింటిలో test చేయండి.
Q-MFA-FATIGUE
MFA Fatigue Attack Detected — Security detects repeated unauthorized MFA push attempts targeting a user
MFA Fatigue Attack Detect అయింది — Unauthorized push attempts
Ticket:SEC-P1-MFA-33102 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Immediately block the targeted account
    Suspend the user in Okta to stop the attack. Every second of delay risks the user accidentally approving a push (MFA fatigue — user approves just to stop the notifications).
    Attack ఆపడానికి Okta లో user suspend చేయండి. ప్రతి second of delay user accidentally push approve చేసే risk ఉంది (MFA fatigue — notifications ఆపడానికి user approve చేస్తారు).
  • 2
    Block source IPs immediately
    Identify the attacker's IPs from Okta System Logs and add them to Okta's network blocklist. Also notify your SIEM/SOC team.
    Okta System Logs నుండి attacker's IPs identify చేసి Okta's network blocklist కు add చేయండి. SIEM/SOC team ని notify చేయండి.
  • 3
    Reset credentials and re-enroll MFA
    Force a password reset for the targeted user. Remove current MFA factors and re-enroll using phishing-resistant methods (FIDO2/Okta FastPass) — not SMS or basic push.
    Targeted user కోసం password reset force చేయండి. Current MFA factors remove చేసి phishing-resistant methods (FIDO2/Okta FastPass) వాడి re-enroll చేయండి — SMS లేదా basic push కాదు.
  • 4
    Review sign-in history for credential compromise
    Check if the attacker had the user's correct password (which means they needed only MFA approval). If credentials were compromised, scope the breach and investigate phishing emails.
    Attacker user's correct password కలిగి ఉన్నారా check చేయండి (MFA approval మాత్రమే అవసరం అని అర్థం). Credentials compromised అయితే phishing emails investigate చేయండి.
  • 5
    Enable number matching to prevent future attacks
    Configure Okta Verify number matching — user must type a number shown on screen into the app before approving. Eliminates blind approval attacks.
    Okta Verify number matching configure చేయండి — user screen లో చూపించిన number app లో type చేయాలి. Blind approval attacks eliminate అవుతాయి.
  • 6
    Educate the user
    Explain to the user: 'If you receive an Okta push you didn't initiate, DENY it and report it immediately. Never approve unexpected pushes.'
    User కు explain చేయండి: 'మీరు initiate చేయని Okta push వస్తే, DENY చేయండి మరియు immediately report చేయండి. Unexpected pushes ఎప్పుడూ approve చేయకండి.'
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
MFA fatigue is a real and growing attack. I respond by immediately blocking the account to stop the attack, then secure the user with phishing-resistant MFA. Speed is critical — every minute of delay increases the chance of accidental approval.
MFA fatigue real మరియు growing attack. Account block చేసి attack ఆపి, phishing-resistant MFA తో user secure చేస్తాను. Speed critical — ప్రతి minute accidental approval chance పెరుగుతుంది.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — HospitalSystem — CMO Account MFA Fatigue Attack  — HospitalSystem — CMO Account MFA Fatigue Attack
RegionalHospital SOC detected that Chief Medical Officer Dr. Rao received 47 Okta Verify push notifications in 8 minutes at 2 AM. An attacker had obtained Dr. Rao's password (from a data breach) and was pushing repeatedly hoping he'd approve one while half-asleep. SOC immediately: 1) Suspended Dr. Rao's account. 2) Blocked the attacking IPs (traced to an overseas VPN exit node). 3) Called Dr. Rao to confirm he hadn't approved anything. 4) Next day: Re-enrolled Dr. Rao with FIDO2 hardware key — his phone now requires biometric + hardware key. 5) Number matching enabled for all executives. Zero successful MFA fatigue attacks since.
RegionalHospital SOC detect చేసింది: CMO Dr. Rao రాత్రి 2 AM లో 8 నిమిషాల్లో 47 Okta Verify push notifications receive చేశాడు. Attacker Dr. Rao's password obtain చేసి repeatedly push చేస్తున్నారు. SOC immediately: 1) Dr. Rao's account suspend. 2) Attacking IPs block. 3) Dr. Rao కు call చేసి approve చేయలేదని confirm చేశారు. 4) Next day: FIDO2 hardware key తో re-enroll. 5) అన్ని executives కు number matching enable.
← Back to Okta Guide
🔄 Provisioning & Lifecycle
L3 Questions
🔄
Interview Prep › Provisioning & Lifecycle
Provisioning & Lifecycle Questions
Provisioning & జీవిత చక్ర ప్రశ్నలు
L3 P1 Onboarding Workday · SCIM · Okta LCM
Q3
Workday Provisioning Failure — New hire appears in Okta but not created in Workday/target app
New Hire Workday లో Create అవ్వడం లేదు
Ticket:IAM-PROV-33102 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Check provisioning status in Okta
    Go to Applications > Workday > Provisioning tab. Review the user's profile push log — look for 'Push Failed' or 'Pending' status. Note the exact error message.
    Applications > Workday > Provisioning tab కు వెళ్ళండి. User's profile push log review చేయండి — 'Push Failed' లేదా 'Pending' status కోసం చూడండి. Exact error message note చేయండి.
  • 2
    Validate required attribute mappings
    Workday requires specific mandatory fields: employeeID, manager, costCenter, location. If any are null or misformatted, the SCIM call will be rejected with a 400 error.
    Workday specific mandatory fields అవసరం: employeeID, manager, costCenter, location. ఏదైనా null లేదా misformatted అయినా SCIM call 400 error తో reject అవుతుంది.
  • 3
    Review provisioning API error logs
    Check the raw SCIM API response in the provisioning logs. A 401 means API credentials expired. A 400 means schema/attribute issue. A 500 means Workday-side server error.
    Provisioning logs లో raw SCIM API response check చేయండి. 401 అంటే API credentials expired. 400 అంటే schema/attribute issue. 500 అంటే Workday-side server error.
  • 4
    Confirm Workday connector health and API credentials
    Verify the Workday provisioning API credentials haven't expired. Test the connection using 'Test API Credentials' in Okta. Expired service account passwords break all provisioning.
    Workday provisioning API credentials expire అవ్వలేదా verify చేయండి. Okta లో 'Test API Credentials' వాడి connection test చేయండి. Expired service account passwords అన్ని provisioning break చేస్తాయి.
  • 5
    Retry provisioning after attribute fix
    Correct the missing/invalid attributes (coordinate with HR if needed), then manually retry the profile push. Monitor the next sync cycle to confirm success.
    Missing/invalid attributes correct చేసి (అవసరమైతే HR తో coordinate చేయండి), manually profile push retry చేయండి. Success confirm చేయడానికి next sync cycle monitor చేయండి.
  • 6
    Coordinate with HR and validate source data
    Confirm the hire's data in Workday (not Okta) — sometimes HR enters incorrect fields that break downstream provisioning. Add a pre-sync data validation check.
    Workday లో (Okta లో కాదు) hire's data confirm చేయండి — sometimes HR incorrect fields enter చేస్తారు downstream provisioning break చేస్తాయి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
New hire provisioning failures usually come from missing or incorrect employee data. I trace the error from Okta's push log to the SCIM API response, fix the data issue, and retry. My goal is to get the new hire's access ready before their first day.
New hire provisioning failures సాధారణంగా missing లేదా incorrect employee data వల్ల వస్తాయి. Okta's push log నుండి SCIM API response వరకు error trace చేసి, data issue fix చేసి, retry చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — TechStartup — Day-One Access Crisis  — TechStartup — Day-One Access Crisis
TechStartup uses Workday as HR source of truth and Okta for provisioning. When senior engineer Akash started on a Monday, his Okta account was created but Slack, Jira, and GitHub had no accounts. Investigation: The Workday integration threw a SCIM 400 error — Akash's 'manager' field was blank in Workday because his manager had resigned the previous week and wasn't replaced in the system. Workday's SCIM schema required manager as mandatory. Fix: HR team assigned an interim manager in Workday, IAM team corrected the attribute mapping, retried provisioning — all 3 apps provisioned within 6 minutes. Post-fix: Added a pre-hire data validation check that alerts HR when mandatory attributes are missing before a hire's start date.
TechStartup Workday ని HR source of truth గా మరియు Okta ని provisioning కోసం వాడుతుంది. Senior engineer Akash Monday start అయినప్పుడు Okta account created అయింది కానీ Slack, Jira, GitHub లో accounts లేవు. Investigation: Workday integration SCIM 400 error throw చేసింది — Akash's 'manager' field Workday లో blank గా ఉంది, ఎందుకంటే అతని manager previous week resign చేశారు. Fix: HR interim manager assign చేసింది, IAM team attribute mapping correct చేసి retry చేసింది — 6 నిమిషాల్లో అన్ని 3 apps provision.
Q9
Terminated User Still Has Access — Deprovisioning failure leaves ex-employee with active system access
Terminate అయిన User కు ఇంకా Access ఉంది
Ticket:SEC-ALERT-49017 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Immediate containment — Suspend NOW
    Manually suspend the user in Okta and Entra ID immediately. Do NOT wait to investigate root cause first — revoke access now, investigate later. Revoke all active sessions and refresh tokens.
    Okta మరియు Entra ID లో user ని immediately manually suspend చేయండి. Root cause investigate చేయడానికి వేచి ఉండకండి — ముందు access revoke చేయండి, తర్వాత investigate చేయండి. Active sessions మరియు refresh tokens అన్నీ revoke చేయండి.
  • 2
    Verify termination source in Workday
    Confirm the termination date and status in Workday (HR system). Check if the termination was properly marked — sometimes HR marks 'Voluntary Resign' but doesn't set the end date correctly.
    Workday (HR system) లో termination date మరియు status confirm చేయండి. Termination properly marked అయిందా check చేయండి — sometimes HR 'Voluntary Resign' mark చేస్తారు కానీ end date correctly set చేయరు.
  • 3
    Check lifecycle workflow execution
    Review Okta Lifecycle Management logs: did the deactivation workflow trigger? Did it complete? Which steps succeeded and which failed? Look for attribute mismatch that prevented triggering.
    Okta Lifecycle Management logs review చేయండి: deactivation workflow trigger అయిందా? Complete అయిందా? ఏ steps succeeded మరియు ఏవి failed? Triggering prevent చేసిన attribute mismatch కోసం చూడండి.
  • 4
    Audit app-by-app deprovisioning status
    Check each integrated app: Salesforce, Microsoft 365, Slack, GitHub, etc. Some apps may support automated deprovisioning but others may require manual action. Document every gap.
    ప్రతి integrated app check చేయండి: Salesforce, Microsoft 365, Slack, GitHub, etc. కొన్ని apps automated deprovisioning support చేస్తాయి కానీ మరికొన్నికి manual action అవసరం. ప్రతి gap document చేయండి.
  • 5
    Root cause and permanent fix
    Identify why the lifecycle workflow failed: missing HR attribute (status field not mapped), timing gap (Workday-to-Okta sync delay), or workflow misconfiguration. Fix and test with a test user.
    Lifecycle workflow ఎందుకు failed అయిందో identify చేయండి: missing HR attribute, timing gap (Workday-to-Okta sync delay), లేదా workflow misconfiguration. Fix చేసి test user తో test చేయండి.
  • 6
    Report to Security and document the incident
    File a security incident report. Note the duration of unauthorized access, which systems were accessible, and whether any data access occurred. Provide remediation plan.
    Security incident report file చేయండి. Unauthorized access duration, accessible systems, data access జరిగిందా నోట్ చేయండి. Remediation plan provide చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
A terminated employee with active access is a security incident, not just a ticket. I contain first by suspending accounts, then investigate the root cause, then fix the lifecycle workflow to prevent recurrence — and report the incident for compliance.
Terminate అయిన employee కు active access ఉండటం security incident, simple ticket కాదు. ముందు accounts suspend చేసి contain చేస్తాను, తర్వాత root cause investigate చేసి lifecycle workflow fix చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — HealthSystem — Ex-Doctor PHI Access Risk  — HealthSystem — Ex-Doctor PHI Access Risk
HealthSystem Security team got alerted at 9 PM: former radiologist Dr. Kapoor, who had resigned 3 days ago, had just logged into the Epic EHR system and viewed 12 patient records. Immediate response: 1) IAM lead suspended Dr. Kapoor's accounts in Okta and Azure AD within 4 minutes. 2) Epic admin manually revoked the active session. 3) Security pulled the access log — Dr. Kapoor had accessed old patient records (later determined to be for legitimate follow-up, but process was wrong). Root cause: The Workday termination had a status field 'Leave of Absence' instead of 'Terminated', which didn't trigger the Okta deprovisioning workflow. Fix: Mapped all 4 exit status values (Resigned, Terminated, LOA, Retired) to trigger deprovisioning. HIPAA breach assessment conducted — 12 records reviewed, no unauthorized sharing found.
HealthSystem Security team రాత్రి 9 PM కి alert వచ్చింది: 3 రోజుల క్రితం resign చేసిన radiologist Dr. Kapoor Epic EHR system లో login చేసి 12 patient records చూశారు. Immediate response: 1) IAM lead 4 నిమిషాల్లో Okta మరియు Azure AD లో Dr. Kapoor accounts suspend. 2) Epic admin active session revoke. Root cause: Workday termination 'Terminated' కాకుండా 'Leave of Absence' status use చేసింది — Okta deprovisioning workflow trigger అవ్వలేదు. Fix: అన్ని 4 exit status values (Resigned, Terminated, LOA, Retired) deprovisioning trigger చేయడానికి map చేశారు.
💡 Senior Insight
In deprovisioning, always map ALL possible exit statuses from the HR system — not just 'Terminated'. LOA, Retired, Contract-End all need to trigger appropriate workflows.
Deprovisioning లో HR system నుండి ALL possible exit statuses map చేయండి — 'Terminated' మాత్రమే కాదు. LOA, Retired, Contract-End అన్నీ appropriate workflows trigger చేయాలి.
Q22
Rehired Employee Creates Duplicate Okta Profiles — Same person has two identities in the system
Rehired Employee కు Duplicate Okta Profiles
Ticket:INC-LCM-55021 Priority:P2 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Identify the duplicate profiles by unique identifiers
    Compare both Okta profiles: check employeeID, email, login, and externalId. Determine which profile is 'active' and which is the orphaned old one.
    రెండు Okta profiles compare చేయండి: employeeID, email, login, మరియు externalId check చేయండి. ఏ profile 'active' మరియు ఏది orphaned old one అని determine చేయండి.
  • 2
    Determine the correct source of authority
    Check Workday — does it show one record or two? Confirm which Okta profile Workday is pushing to. The correct profile should be linked to the current Workday record.
    Workday check చేయండి — ఒక record చూపిస్తుందా లేదా రెండు చూపిస్తుందా? Workday ఏ Okta profile కు pushing చేస్తుందో confirm చేయండి.
  • 3
    Preserve the correct profile's app access and data
    Before merging or deleting, list all app assignments on both profiles. Transfer any unique assignments from the old profile to the new one.
    Merge లేదా delete చేయడానికి ముందు రెండు profiles లో app assignments list చేయండి. Old profile నుండి unique assignments new profile కు transfer చేయండి.
  • 4
    Deactivate and clean up the duplicate profile
    Deactivate (not delete) the old/duplicate profile. Remove its app assignments. Update any system references (if other apps reference the old profile's ID).
    Old/duplicate profile deactivate (delete కాదు) చేయండి. App assignments remove చేయండి. Other apps old profile's ID reference చేస్తే update చేయండి.
  • 5
    Fix the rehire workflow in Okta LCM
    The root cause is the rehire workflow not matching on the correct unique identifier (employeeID). Fix the matching rule so rehires link to the existing profile instead of creating a new one.
    Root cause: rehire workflow correct unique identifier (employeeID) match చేయడం లేదు. Rehires new profile create చేయడానికి బదులు existing profile link చేసేలా matching rule fix చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Rehire duplicates happen when lifecycle automation doesn't recognize a returning employee. I safely merge the identities, ensure the employee has one correct profile with the right access, and fix the workflow to handle future rehires correctly.
Lifecycle automation returning employee ని recognize చేయనప్పుడు rehire duplicates జరుగుతాయి. Identities safely merge చేసి, employee కు correct profile మరియు right access ఉన్నాయని confirm చేసి, future rehires కోసం workflow fix చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — ConsultingFirm — Senior Partner Rehire Duplicate  — ConsultingFirm — Senior Partner Rehire Duplicate
ConsultingFirm rehired Meera, a senior consultant who had left 18 months prior. Her old Okta profile had been deactivated but not deleted. When Workday created a new HR record for her (with a new employeeID — the firm reuses IDs after 12 months), Okta's provisioning created a second profile. Meera ended up with two Okta accounts, and when she tried to log in to Salesforce, she got a 'multiple accounts' conflict error. Fix: IAM identified that the firm's Workday integration matched on employeeID — and since IDs were reused, the matching failed. Solution: Added email address as a secondary matching attribute (email never changes for a person). Merged the profiles, transferred her app access. Going forward, the firm stopped reusing employeeIDs.
ConsultingFirm Meera ని rehire చేసింది, 18 నెలల క్రితం వెళ్ళిన senior consultant. ఆమె old Okta profile deactivated కానీ deleted కాలేదు. Workday ఆమె కోసం new HR record create చేసినప్పుడు (new employeeID తో — firm 12 నెలల తర్వాత IDs reuse చేస్తుంది), Okta provisioning second profile create చేసింది. Meera రెండు Okta accounts తో ముగిసింది, Salesforce login చేయడానికి try చేసినప్పుడు 'multiple accounts' conflict error వచ్చింది. Fix: Email address ని secondary matching attribute గా add చేశారు. Profiles merge చేసి, app access transfer చేశారు. Going forward, firm employeeIDs reuse చేయడం ఆపింది.
← Back to Okta Guide
☁️ Entra ID & Conditional Access
L2 / L3 Questions
☁️
Interview Prep › Entra ID & Conditional Access
Entra ID & Conditional Access Questions
Entra ID & Conditional Access ప్రశ్నలు
L2 L3 P1 Exec Impact
Q2
Entra ID Conditional Access Blocking Login — User cannot access Microsoft 365 from a new device
Conditional Access Microsoft 365 Login Block చేస్తోంది
Ticket:INC-AAD-20987 Priority:P2 · L2
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Review Sign-In Logs in Entra ID
    Go to Entra ID > Sign-in Logs > filter by user and time. Find the blocked sign-in. In the CA column, expand to see which specific policy blocked it and the exact failure reason.
    Entra ID > Sign-in Logs > user మరియు time filter. Blocked sign-in find చేయండి. CA column లో expand చేసి ఏ specific policy block చేసిందో మరియు exact failure reason చూడండి.
  • 2
    Identify blocking policy and condition
    Note the policy name and the condition that failed: Device compliance (not Intune-enrolled), Location (unknown IP/country), MFA (no registered method), or Client app (legacy protocol).
    Policy name మరియు failed condition note చేయండి: Device compliance (Intune-enrolled కాదు), Location (unknown IP), MFA (registered method లేదు), లేదా Client app (legacy protocol).
  • 3
    Validate device registration/compliance status
    Check if the device is Entra ID joined, hybrid joined, or registered in Intune. If a new device, it may not have completed enrollment. Guide user through device enrollment or Intune compliance setup.
    Device Entra ID joined, hybrid joined, లేదా Intune లో registered అయిందా check చేయండి. New device అయితే enrollment complete కాలేదు. User ని device enrollment guide చేయండి.
  • 4
    Use the What-If tool to simulate the login
    Entra ID > Conditional Access > What If tool. Enter the user, app, device platform, location. See exactly which policies apply and which would block — very powerful for diagnosis without affecting the user.
    Entra ID > Conditional Access > What If tool. User, app, device platform, location enter చేయండి. Policies apply అవుతున్నాయా మరియు ఏది block చేస్తుందో exactly చూడండి.
  • 5
    Apply a targeted fix — temporary exclusion or device enrollment
    Option A: Add the user to an exclusion group for the blocking policy temporarily (document and time-bound this). Option B: Help the user enroll the new device in Intune and meet compliance requirements.
    Option A: User ని blocking policy exclusion group లో temporarily add చేయండి (document మరియు time-bound). Option B: User new device Intune లో enroll చేయడానికి help చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Conditional Access blocks usually happen because a device isn't compliant or a new location triggered a restriction. I find the exact blocking policy using sign-in logs and the What-If tool, then resolve it — either by helping the user comply or applying a documented, time-bound exception.
Conditional Access blocks device comply చేయకపోవడం వల్ల లేదా new location restriction trigger చేయడం వల్ల జరుగుతాయి. Sign-in logs మరియు What-If tool వాడి exact blocking policy find చేసి resolve చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — LawFirm — Partner Blocked During Client Meeting  — LawFirm — Partner Blocked During Client Meeting
LawFirm senior partner Advani was in a client meeting in Singapore when he couldn't access Microsoft 365 on his new MacBook. The CA policy required devices to be Intune-compliant. His MacBook was new and hadn't been enrolled in Intune yet. IAM engineer used the What-If tool to confirm the block, then: 1) Added Advani to a temporary exclusion group (documented with CISO approval, 48-hour expiry). 2) Sent Advani the Intune Company Portal link to self-enroll his MacBook. 3) Once enrolled and compliant (took ~20 minutes), removed him from the exclusion group. Advani was unblocked within 8 minutes for the immediate meeting, and his device was fully compliant 20 minutes later.
LawFirm senior partner Advani Singapore లో client meeting లో ఉన్నప్పుడు new MacBook లో Microsoft 365 access చేయలేకపోయాడు. CA policy devices Intune-compliant అవ్వాలని require చేసింది. MacBook new గా ఉంది, Intune లో enroll కాలేదు. IAM engineer What-If tool వాడి block confirm చేసి: 1) Advani ని temporary exclusion group లో add చేశారు (CISO approval, 48-hour expiry). 2) Intune Company Portal link పంపారు. 3) Enrolled అయిన తర్వాత exclusion group నుండి remove చేశారు. 8 నిమిషాల్లో Advani unblocked.
Q4
Active Directory Sync Issues with Entra ID Connect — Password changes in AD not syncing to Microsoft Entra ID
AD Password Changes Entra ID తో Sync కావడం లేదు
Ticket:INC-SYNC-77891 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Verify Entra ID Connect service status
    On the Entra ID Connect server: check Windows Services for 'Microsoft Azure AD Sync'. Confirm it's Running. Also check the Synchronization Service Manager for recent errors.
    Entra ID Connect server లో: Windows Services లో 'Microsoft Azure AD Sync' check చేయండి. Running గా ఉందా confirm చేయండి. Synchronization Service Manager లో recent errors check చేయండి.
  • 2
    Review synchronization logs for errors
    Open Synchronization Service Manager > Operations tab. Look at recent sync runs. Export errors — common issues: 'Export Error', 'Connector Error', 'Invalid DN', 'Duplicate Attribute'.
    Synchronization Service Manager > Operations tab. Recent sync runs చూడండి. Errors export చేయండి — common issues: 'Export Error', 'Connector Error', 'Invalid DN', 'Duplicate Attribute'.
  • 3
    Validate Password Hash Sync (PHS) is enabled and healthy
    In Entra ID Connect wizard: check if Password Hash Synchronization is enabled. Run ADSyncDiagnostics to test PHS health. Also verify the MSOL service account hasn't had its password expired.
    Entra ID Connect wizard లో: Password Hash Synchronization enabled అయిందా check చేయండి. ADSyncDiagnostics run చేసి PHS health test చేయండి. MSOL service account password expire అవ్వలేదా verify చేయండి.
  • 4
    Check if the affected AD account is excluded from sync
    Confirm the user isn't in an OU excluded from sync scope. Check for filtering rules in the Connect configuration that might exclude the user.
    User sync scope నుండి excluded OU లో లేరా confirm చేయండి. Connect configuration లో user exclude చేసే filtering rules check చేయండి.
  • 5
    Run a manual delta or full synchronization
    In PowerShell: Start-ADSyncSyncCycle -PolicyType Delta. Monitor in Sync Manager. If PHS issue, force a password hash cycle: Invoke-ADSyncCSObjectPasswordHashSync.
    PowerShell లో: Start-ADSyncSyncCycle -PolicyType Delta. Sync Manager లో monitor చేయండి. PHS issue అయినా, password hash cycle force చేయండి: Invoke-ADSyncCSObjectPasswordHashSync.
  • 6
    Escalate to repair if sync service is corrupted
    If logs show repeated database errors or the sync service keeps crashing: check disk space, check Windows event logs for corruption signs. Consider running the Connect Repair Wizard.
    Logs repeated database errors లేదా sync service crash అవుతూ ఉంటే: disk space check చేయండి, Windows event logs లో corruption signs check చేయండి. Connect Repair Wizard run చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
AD-to-Entra sync failures affect every cloud login. I diagnose systematically — from service health to PHS config to logs — and use PowerShell to force resync once the root cause is fixed. Clear communication with the infrastructure team is essential during a P1.
AD-to-Entra sync failures ప్రతి cloud login ని affect చేస్తాయి. Service health నుండి PHS config నుండి logs వరకు systematically diagnose చేసి, root cause fix అయిన తర్వాత PowerShell వాడి resync force చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — ManufacturingCo — Mass Password Change Failure  — ManufacturingCo — Mass Password Change Failure
ManufacturingCo IT policy required all 3,500 employees to change their passwords within 24 hours of a security audit. By 10 AM, the ServiceDesk was flooded: employees were changing passwords in AD but couldn't log into Microsoft 365, Teams, or SharePoint. IAM team found: The Entra ID Connect server's MSOL service account password had expired the previous night — a 90-day rotation policy that nobody had scheduled a reminder for. PHS stopped working silently. Fix: 1) Updated the MSOL service account password. 2) Restarted the sync service. 3) Ran Invoke-ADSyncCSObjectPasswordHashSync to force a full PHS cycle. 4) Within 35 minutes, all 3,500 employees could log in with new passwords. Post-incident: Added a 14-day expiry alert for all sync service accounts.
ManufacturingCo IT policy 3,500 employees అందరూ 24 గంటల్లో passwords change చేయాలని require చేసింది. 10 AM కి ServiceDesk flood అయింది: employees AD లో passwords change చేస్తున్నారు కానీ Microsoft 365, Teams, SharePoint లో login చేయలేకపోయారు. IAM team కనుగొంది: Entra ID Connect server యొక్క MSOL service account password previous night expire అయింది — 90-day rotation policy, reminder schedule చేయలేదు. PHS silently stop అయింది. Fix: 1) MSOL service account password update. 2) Sync service restart. 3) Invoke-ADSyncCSObjectPasswordHashSync run. 4) 35 నిమిషాల్లో అన్ని 3,500 employees login చేయగలిగారు.
Q-CA-EXEC
Conditional Access Policy Blocks Executives — Executives locked out of Microsoft 365 during international travel
Executives International Travel లో Microsoft 365 Block అయ్యారు
Ticket:INC-P1-AAD-55801 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Immediately identify blocked sign-ins in Entra ID
    Filter Sign-in Logs by the executive's account and last 1 hour. Identify the CA policy blocking access and the specific condition (IP country, device state).
    Executive's account మరియు last 1 hour ద్వారా Sign-in Logs filter చేయండి. Access block చేసే CA policy మరియు specific condition (IP country, device state) identify చేయండి.
  • 2
    Confirm the sign-ins are legitimate (not attack)
    Before unblocking, verify: Is the travel expected? Does the exec confirm they're logging in? Is the IP a known hotel/airport? Rule out account compromise before relaxing controls.
    Unblock చేయడానికి ముందు verify చేయండి: Travel expected గా ఉందా? Exec login చేస్తున్నారని confirm చేశారా? IP known hotel/airport గా ఉందా? Controls relax చేయడానికి ముందు account compromise rule out చేయండి.
  • 3
    Apply a temporary, time-bound location exclusion
    Add the executive to a 'Traveling Executives' exclusion group in the CA policy. Set an expiry of 7 days (matching the travel duration). Document with manager and CISO approval.
    Executive ని CA policy లో 'Traveling Executives' exclusion group లో add చేయండి. 7 days expiry set చేయండి (travel duration match చేసే). Manager మరియు CISO approval తో document చేయండి.
  • 4
    Implement a permanent solution for travel scenarios
    Design a 'Named Locations' policy: pre-approved countries listed as trusted. Alternatively, implement risk-based access (instead of geo-block) — allow travel if device is compliant and MFA is passed.
    'Named Locations' policy design చేయండి: pre-approved countries trusted గా list చేయండి. Alternatively, risk-based access implement చేయండి — device compliant మరియు MFA passed అయితే travel allow చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Blocking executives during travel is a business-critical issue, not just a ticket. I verify the login is legitimate, apply a documented emergency exception, then redesign the policy to handle travel scenarios without creating security gaps.
Travel లో executives block చేయడం business-critical issue. Login legitimate అని verify చేసి, documented emergency exception apply చేసి, security gaps లేకుండా travel scenarios handle చేయడానికి policy redesign చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — GlobalBank — CFO Airport Block  — GlobalBank — CFO Airport Block
GlobalBank had a Conditional Access policy: 'Block access from countries not in the approved list.' At 6 AM on a Monday, the CFO Ms. Sharma — in Dubai for a board meeting — couldn't access her Microsoft 365 email to review merger documents. The UAE wasn't in the approved country list. IAM on-call: 1) Verified with the CFO's EA that the travel was planned. 2) Added Ms. Sharma to 'Executive-TravelExclusion' group — CA policy excluded this group. 3) Ms. Sharma had access within 3 minutes. 4) That week, the IAM team redesigned the policy: Instead of country-block, they implemented risk-score based access — executives can access from anywhere if device is Intune-compliant + phishing-resistant MFA is used. No more geography-based lockouts.
GlobalBank Conditional Access policy: 'Approved list లో లేని countries నుండి access block చేయండి.' Monday 6 AM కి Dubai లో board meeting కోసం ఉన్న CFO Ms. Sharma Microsoft 365 email access చేయలేకపోయింది. UAE approved country list లో లేదు. IAM on-call: 1) Travel planned గా ఉందని verify చేశారు. 2) Ms. Sharma ని 'Executive-TravelExclusion' group లో add చేశారు. 3) 3 నిమిషాల్లో access వచ్చింది. 4) ఆ week IAM team policy redesign చేసింది: country-block బదులు risk-score based access implement చేశారు.
← Back to Okta Guide
🚨 P1 Security Incidents
Senior L3 / On-Call
🚨
Interview Prep › P1 Security Incidents
P1 Security Incident Questions
P1 భద్రతా సంఘటన ప్రశ్నలు
P1 Priority Senior L3
P1-1
Terminated User Still Has Access — P1 Security Risk across Workday, Okta, O365, Salesforce
Terminated User కు Multiple Apps లో Access ఉంది
Ticket:SEC-P1-10477 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    First 15 minutes — Contain immediately
    Suspend user in Okta AND Entra ID. Revoke all refresh tokens. Force sign-out from Microsoft 365. Disable in critical SaaS apps (Salesforce, Slack, GitHub) manually if SCIM deprovisioning failed. DO NOT wait for root cause analysis.
    Okta మరియు Entra ID రెండింటిలో user suspend చేయండి. Refresh tokens అన్నీ revoke చేయండి. Microsoft 365 నుండి sign-out force చేయండి. Critical SaaS apps లో manually disable చేయండి. Root cause analysis కోసం వేచి ఉండకండి.
  • 2
    Notify Security Operations immediately
    Open a P1 incident bridge call. Notify SOC, IAM Manager, and CISO. Communicate: user is contained, duration of exposure, apps accessible.
    P1 incident bridge call open చేయండి. SOC, IAM Manager, CISO ని notify చేయండి. Communicate: user contained, exposure duration, accessible apps.
  • 3
    Investigate the deprovisioning failure
    Trace why the lifecycle workflow didn't fire: check termination timestamp in Workday, Okta lifecycle event logs, attribute mapping (look for null status fields), sync timing issues.
    Lifecycle workflow ఎందుకు fire కాలేదో trace చేయండి: Workday లో termination timestamp, Okta lifecycle event logs, attribute mapping (null status fields), sync timing issues check చేయండి.
  • 4
    Audit all data access during the exposure window
    Pull access logs from each system (Microsoft 365 Audit Log, Salesforce Activity Log, Okta System Log) for the gap period. Check if sensitive data was accessed, downloaded, or forwarded.
    Gap period లో ప్రతి system నుండి access logs pull చేయండి (Microsoft 365 Audit Log, Salesforce Activity Log, Okta System Log). Sensitive data access, download, లేదా forward జరిగిందా check చేయండి.
  • 5
    Fix the lifecycle workflow permanently
    Identify the root cause (missing attribute mapping, timing gap, failed API call). Fix it. Test with a test user in a sandbox. Add monitoring alerts for future failed deprovisioning events.
    Root cause identify చేయండి (missing attribute mapping, timing gap, failed API call). Fix చేయండి. Sandbox లో test user తో test చేయండి. Future failed deprovisioning events కోసం monitoring alerts add చేయండి.
  • 6
    Produce a post-incident report
    Document timeline, systems affected, root cause, remediation steps, and preventive controls. Submit to Security and Compliance within 24 hours.
    Timeline, affected systems, root cause, remediation steps, preventive controls document చేయండి. 24 గంటల్లో Security మరియు Compliance కు submit చేయండి.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
This is a security incident, not just a support ticket. My first action is always containment — suspend and revoke access immediately. Then I investigate, then fix, then prevent. Clear communication with leadership throughout the incident is as important as the technical fix.
ఇది security incident, support ticket కాదు. నా first action containment — suspend చేసి access revoke చేయడం. తర్వాత investigate, fix, prevent. Incident అంతటా leadership తో clear communication technical fix అంత important.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — RetailGlobal — Ex-Store Manager Data Risk  — RetailGlobal — Ex-Store Manager Data Risk
RetailGlobal (800 stores, 25,000 employees): A P1 alert fired at 11 PM — ex-store manager Suresh, terminated 4 days prior, had just accessed the Inventory Management System (IMS) and downloaded a CSV of all store stock levels (potential competitive intelligence leak). IAM lead took the call: Minute 0-5: Suspended Suresh in Okta, Entra ID. Revoked all sessions. Minute 5-15: Manually disabled his IMS account (IMS didn't support SCIM). Minute 15-30: Investigation — Workday showed termination event, but the Okta lifecycle rule required the 'EmployeeStatus' field = 'Terminated', and Workday was sending 'Term' (abbreviation). The rule never matched. Fix: Updated rule to match 'Term' OR 'Terminated'. Data impact: Legal confirmed the CSV contained non-sensitive stock data — no breach notification required. Lesson: Never assume attribute values match exactly — always validate data formatting from HR systems.
RetailGlobal (800 stores): P1 alert రాత్రి 11 PM — terminate అయిన 4 రోజులకు ex-store manager Suresh IMS access చేసి store stock levels CSV download చేశాడు. IAM lead: 0-5 నిమిషాలు: Okta, Entra ID లో suspend. Sessions revoke. 5-15 నిమిషాలు: IMS account manually disable. 15-30 నిమిషాలు: Investigation — Workday 'Term' పంపింది కానీ Okta rule 'Terminated' expect చేసింది. Rule match కాలేదు. Fix: Rule 'Term' OR 'Terminated' match చేయడానికి update. Lesson: HR systems నుండి attribute values exactly match అవుతాయని assume చేయకండి.
💡 Senior Insight
In deprovisioning, attribute value formatting mismatches are silent killers. Always validate exact string values from HR systems — 'Terminated' vs 'Term' vs 'T' can each behave differently.
Deprovisioning లో attribute value formatting mismatches silent killers. HR systems నుండి exact string values validate చేయండి — 'Terminated' vs 'Term' vs 'T' వేర్వేరుగా behave చేయవచ్చు.
P1-2
Privileged Role Assigned Without Approval — User had Global Admin access for 3 days without authorization
Approval లేకుండా Global Admin Role Assign అయింది
Ticket:SEC-P1-77340 Priority:P1 · L3
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Remove the privileged role immediately
    This is step 1. Do not investigate first. Remove Global Admin from the user in Entra ID Roles. If PIM is enabled, cancel any active role assignments. Verify removal in audit logs.
    ఇది step 1. ముందు investigate చేయకండి. Entra ID Roles లో user నుండి Global Admin remove చేయండి. PIM enabled అయితే active role assignments cancel చేయండి. Audit logs లో removal verify చేయండి.
  • 2
    Rotate credentials if the account was active
    If the user performed any admin actions during the 3-day window, rotate their password and reset MFA — the account's privilege period may have been used for changes.
    User 3-day window లో admin actions perform చేసినా, password rotate చేసి MFA reset చేయండి — privilege period changes కోసం use చేసి ఉండవచ్చు.
  • 3
    Audit all actions taken during the unauthorized privilege window
    Pull the Entra ID audit logs for the 3-day period filtered by this user. Look for: role assignments made, policies changed, apps registered, users created, consent granted.
    3-day period లో ఈ user ద్వారా filter చేసిన Entra ID audit logs pull చేయండి. Role assignments, policies changed, apps registered, users created, consent granted కోసం చూడండి.
  • 4
    Identify the root cause — how was the role assigned?
    Check if it was: accidental manual assignment (no PIM), a script error, a lifecycle workflow bug, or a gap in PIM approval configuration. Find the exact assignment event in audit logs.
    Accident manual assignment (PIM లేకుండా), script error, lifecycle workflow bug, లేదా PIM approval configuration gap గా ఏది అయిందో check చేయండి. Audit logs లో exact assignment event find చేయండి.
  • 5
    Enforce PIM and require approval + MFA for all admin roles
    Implement Privileged Identity Management: all admin roles are 'eligible' not 'permanent'. Activation requires: justification + manager approval + MFA + time limit (max 4 hours).
    Privileged Identity Management implement చేయండి: అన్ని admin roles 'permanent' కాదు 'eligible'. Activation require చేస్తుంది: justification + manager approval + MFA + time limit (max 4 hours).
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Unauthorized privileged access is a compliance violation and security incident. I remove the access immediately, audit what was done during the window, find the root cause, and implement PIM to prevent it from ever happening again.
Unauthorized privileged access compliance violation మరియు security incident. Access immediately remove చేసి, window లో ఏమి జరిగిందో audit చేసి, root cause find చేసి, మళ్ళీ జరగకుండా PIM implement చేస్తాను.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — FinTechCo — Global Admin Assigned via Script Bug  — FinTechCo — Global Admin Assigned via Script Bug
FinTechCo auditor flagged: Junior developer Ravi had been Global Admin in Entra ID for 72 hours. Ravi had no idea — he never even tried to use admin functions. Investigation: An onboarding automation script had a role assignment array bug — it was supposed to assign 'Developer' role but instead assigned 'Global Administrator' (array index error in a JSON payload). During the 72-hour window, Ravi hadn't made any admin changes (he was unaware). Immediate actions: Removed Global Admin, no credential rotation needed (no misuse). PIM implemented: All roles now require justification + HR Manager approval + 4-hour max activation. The script bug was fixed with a role name validation check. Compliance impact: Self-reported to auditors, accepted as inadvertent with controls now in place.
FinTechCo auditor flagged: Junior developer Ravi 72 గంటలు Entra ID లో Global Admin గా ఉన్నాడు. Investigation: Onboarding automation script role assignment array bug కలిగి ఉంది — 'Developer' role assign చేయాల్సింది కానీ బదులుగా 'Global Administrator' assign అయింది (JSON payload లో array index error). 72 గంటల్లో Ravi admin changes చేయలేదు. Immediate: Global Admin removed. PIM implement: అన్ని roles ఇప్పుడు justification + HR Manager approval + 4-hour max activation require చేస్తున్నాయి.
← Back to Okta Guide
💀 P0 Breach & Active Threats
Senior L3 / CISO Level
💀
Interview Prep › P0 Breach & Active Threats
P0 Breach & Active Threat Scenarios
P0 ఉల్లంఘన & సక్రియ బెదిరింపు దృశ్యాలు
P0 Critical CISO Level
P0-1
Token Replay Attack Bypassing MFA — Valid OAuth tokens reused from different geolocations after MFA
Token Replay Attack — MFA Bypass చేయడం
Ticket:SEC-P0-ID-90871 Priority:P0 · Active
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Revoke all refresh tokens tenant-wide for impacted users
    This is the only immediate way to stop token replay. Use PowerShell: Revoke-AzureADUserAllRefreshToken or Entra ID admin portal. This forces re-authentication on ALL devices.
    Token replay ఆపడానికి ఇది only immediate way. PowerShell వాడండి: Revoke-AzureADUserAllRefreshToken లేదా Entra ID admin portal. ఇది ALL devices లో re-authentication force చేస్తుంది.
  • 2
    Identify the attack vector — how was the token stolen?
    Review sign-in logs for: the original token issuance location/device vs replay locations. Look for browser extension compromise, compromised device, or adversary-in-the-middle (AiTM) phishing proxy.
    Token issuance location/device vs replay locations కోసం sign-in logs review చేయండి. Browser extension compromise, compromised device, లేదా AiTM phishing proxy కోసం చూడండి.
  • 3
    Enable Continuous Access Evaluation (CAE) immediately
    CAE makes Entra ID push access revocation to apps in near-real-time (instead of waiting for token expiry). Apps that support CAE will reject stolen tokens within seconds of revocation.
    CAE Entra ID access revocation apps కు near-real-time లో push చేస్తుంది (token expiry కోసం వేచి ఉండకుండా). CAE support చేసే apps revocation యొక్క seconds లో stolen tokens reject చేస్తాయి.
  • 4
    Reduce token lifetime to minimize blast radius
    Set access token lifetime to 1 hour max. For sensitive apps, set sign-in frequency to 1 hour (forces re-auth frequently). Reduces the window an attacker has to use a stolen token.
    Access token lifetime max 1 hour కు set చేయండి. Sensitive apps కోసం sign-in frequency 1 hour కు set చేయండి. Attacker stolen token use చేయడానికి window తగ్గిస్తుంది.
  • 5
    Enforce device-bound tokens (phishing-resistant MFA)
    Implement FIDO2 or device-bound passkeys — these tie the token to a specific device. Even if the token is extracted, it cannot be used from another device.
    FIDO2 లేదా device-bound passkeys implement చేయండి — ఇవి token ని specific device కు tie చేస్తాయి. Token extract అయినా another device నుండి use చేయలేరు.
💬 HR-Friendly Answer / HR అనుకూల సమాధానం
Token replay is an advanced attack that MFA alone doesn't stop. I respond by immediately revoking all tokens, enabling CAE for real-time revocation, and transitioning to device-bound authentication. The key insight: MFA proves who you are at login — but doesn't protect tokens after they're issued.
Token replay MFA alone ఆపలేని advanced attack. అన్ని tokens revoke చేసి, real-time revocation కోసం CAE enable చేసి, device-bound authentication కు transition చేస్తాను. Key insight: MFA login వద్ద మీరు ఎవరో proves చేస్తుంది — కానీ issued అయిన తర్వాత tokens protect చేయదు.
🏢 Real-World Example 🏢 నిజ సంస్థ ఉదాహరణ  — FinancialServices — AiTM Phishing Attack  — FinancialServices — AiTM Phishing Attack
FinancialServices Inc SOC detected: 15 employee accounts showing login activity simultaneously from the US (normal) AND Eastern Europe. MFA had been passed for all of them. Analysis: An Adversary-in-the-Middle (AiTM) phishing campaign — employees received fake Microsoft login pages. When they entered credentials AND approved MFA, the attacker's proxy server captured the session cookie/token in real-time and replayed it from a different location. Response: 1) Revoked all refresh tokens for all 15 employees. 2) Forced global password reset. 3) Enabled CAE for Microsoft 365. 4) Within 2 weeks: Deployed FIDO2 hardware keys for all finance staff — AiTM attacks cannot steal device-bound FIDO2 tokens. 5) Conducted phishing simulation training. Zero successful AiTM attacks in the 14 months since FIDO2 deployment.
FinancialServices Inc SOC detect చేసింది: 15 employee accounts US నుండి (normal) మరియు Eastern Europe నుండి simultaneously login activity. MFA అన్నింటికీ pass అయింది. Analysis: Adversary-in-the-Middle (AiTM) phishing campaign — employees fake Microsoft login pages receive చేశారు. Credentials enter చేసి MFA approve చేసినప్పుడు attacker's proxy server real-time లో session cookie/token capture చేసి different location నుండి replay చేసింది. Response: 1) 15 employees అందరి refresh tokens revoke. 2) Global password reset force. 3) Microsoft 365 కు CAE enable. 4) 2 weeks లో: Finance staff అందరికీ FIDO2 hardware keys deploy. FIDO2 deployment తర్వాత 14 నెలల్లో zero successful AiTM attacks.
💡 Senior Insight
Traditional MFA (push/TOTP/SMS) does NOT protect against AiTM phishing proxies. Only phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2, passkeys, certificate-based) stops these attacks because the credential never leaves the device.
Traditional MFA (push/TOTP/SMS) AiTM phishing proxies నుండి protect చేయదు. Only phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2, passkeys, certificate-based) ఈ attacks ఆపుతుంది — credential ఎప్పుడూ device వదలదు.
P0-2
OAuth Consent Abuse — Malicious app silently exfiltrates emails and files without password compromise
OAuth Consent Abuse — Silent Data Exfiltration
Ticket:SEC-P0-ID-104 Priority:P0 · Active
Troubleshooting Steps / సమస్య పరిష్కార దశలు
  • 1
    Immediately revoke the malicious app's consent
    In Entra ID: Enterprise Applications > find the app > Permissions > Revoke all permissions. Also delete the Service Principal. This cuts the app's API access immediately.
    Entra ID: Enterprise Applications > app find చేయండి > Permissions > Revoke all permissions. Service Principal కూడా delete చేయండి. ఇది immediately app's API access cuts చేస్తుంది.
  • 2
    Invalidate all refresh tokens for affected users
    The malicious app may have obtained refresh tokens. Revoke all refresh tokens for users who consented to the app. Force re-authentication.
    Malicious app refresh tokens obtain చేసి ఉండవచ్చు. App కు consent చేసిన users కోసం అన్ని refresh tokens revoke చేయండి.
  • 3
    Pull audit logs to understand data access scope
    Microsoft 365 Compliance Center: Audit Log Search. Filter by the app's service principal. Look for: Mail.Read events (emails read), Files.Read events (files accessed), Send events.
    Microsoft 365 Compliance Center: Audit Log Search. App's service principal ద్వారా filter. Mail.Read events, Files.Read events, Send events కోసం చూడండి.
  • 4
    Restrict user consent to prevent future abuse
